title: Authentic Recordings Guide
description: How to distinguish historical recordings, excerpts, remixes, and synthetic recreations.
intro: This guide is an editorial orientation layer. Historical claims, quotations, dates, and source relationships are added only when supported by repository records.

sections.label: PURPOSE
sections.text: How to distinguish historical recordings, excerpts, remixes, and synthetic recreations.

sections.label: SOURCE STANDARD
sections.text: Records remain visibly incomplete until a source, provenance note, or review status is available.

sections.label: NEXT STEP
sections.text: Use the linked directory hubs to compare available records and return when the index expands.
